name: Base Platform: Solid Foundation
description: This metal platform at the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base uses a classic structural design found in some building foundations in Nod-Krai, and its plain appearance belies its impressive load-bearing capacity. A platform like this can not only support objects of varying weights under standard conditions but also serve as a solid foundation for the operation of large engineering machinery on soft ground. It is no exaggeration to say that the present bustle and prosperity of the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base is built upon this solid foundation.
